summary: Frontend testing for LOGITAG vignettes (square cards) feature - Grid/Table toggle views for Engins and Tags pages. All 9 test cases PASSED. Fixed 2 bugs in search input handlers.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 errors from external API (omniyat.is-certified.com) - not a code issue

engins_page.grid_view_default: PASS - Grid view is the DEFAULT view on page load
engins_page.toggle_visible: PASS - Toggle buttons visible in header (grid icon active with black background)
engins_page.vignette_content: PASS - Each vignette contains: photo/icon, name (bold), badges (Etat, Status, Famille, Tag ID), 'Localiser' button (blue gradient, centered), footer with location and battery bar
engins_page.search_bar: PASS - Search bar 'Rechercher un asset...' visible in grid mode
engins_page.toggle_to_table: PASS - Clicking list icon switches to DataTable view, list icon becomes active (black background)
engins_page.toggle_back_to_grid: PASS - Clicking grid icon switches back to grid view with vignettes

tags_page.grid_view_default: PASS - Grid view is the DEFAULT view on page load
tags_page.toggle_visible: PASS - Toggle buttons visible in header
tags_page.vignette_content: PASS - Each vignette contains: colored family icon, name, badges (Famille BLE, Disponible, Actif), 'Localiser' button (centered, blue gradient) if address exists
tags_page.search_bar: PASS - Search bar 'Rechercher un tag...' visible
tags_page.toggle_to_table: PASS - Toggle to table view works, DataTable displayed

dashboard.period_filter: PASS - Period filter pills visible (Tout, Aujourd'hui, 7 jours, 30 jours, Personnalisé)
dashboard.kpi_cards: PASS - KPI cards visible (11/4935 Engins, 12/53 Tags, etc.)
dashboard.charts: PASS - ApexCharts visible (Répartition État, Distribution Statuts)

bugs_fixed.issue: handleSearch was called with e.target.value (string) instead of event object
Same issue - handleSearch was called with e.target.value instead of event object

context_for_next_testing_agent: All vignette/grid view features tested and working. Grid view is DEFAULT for both Engins and Tags pages. Toggle between grid and table views works correctly. Search bar and pagination visible in grid mode. Fixed 2 bugs in search input handlers. Dashboard period filter and charts working.
